subcodes.first_line: The gaze of divine favor hath ever been directed towards thee, and thou hast been occupied with the remembrance of God and the service of His Cause. All affairs lie manifest before His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طرف عنایت بشما بوده و بذکر حق و خدمت امرش مشغول بوده جمیع امور تلقاء وجه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
